author: Genshin Impact
text:
And so, the seer-witch began a new divination. #GenshinImpact
The warp and weft of fate emerge through the ancient card spread...
"...I should also mention that in principle, hydromancy stands as the one true legitimate art."
"But I suppose to your companions... what was previously 'fate' has long been disrupted by unforeseen occurrences, has it not?"
